entries.name: Cantrips
entries: You can cast the {@spell Chill Touch|XPHB} and {@spell Toll the Dead|XPHB} cantrips from this necklace using your spellcasting or pact magic feature.

entries.name: Spells
entries: You always have the {@spell Inflict Wounds|XPHB} and {@spell Aura of Decay|5BBPrivate} spells prepared. You can cast each of these spells once without expending a spell slot and regain the ability to do so when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. You can also cast the spells using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

entries.name: While Unattuned
entries: At initiative count 20 on every round, every creature within 30 ft. of the necklace takes {@damage 1d6} Necrotic damage. Undead and constructs are immune to this damage. This effect passes through total cover, but not through lead. A creature can stop this effect by starting the process of attuning to the necklace.

spell.name: Aura of Decay
entries: Life-decaying energy radiates from you in a 30-foot {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} for the duration. Whenever the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} enters a creature's space and whenever a creature enters the {@variantrule Emanation [Area of Effect]|XPHB|Emanation} or ends its turn there, the creature must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes {@damage 3d6} Necrotic damage. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage. A creature makes this save only once per turn.
Undead and constructs are immune to this spell.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot
entries: The damage increases by {@scaledamage 3d6|3-9|1d6} for each spell slot level above 3.
